summary: Added schedule-window metadata for Home protocol templates, anchored Today/Weekend/This Week/Custom ranges in named domain rules, surfaced schedule labels in Home protocol forms and rows, and documented the label-only contract without changing protocol run lifecycle.

contract_status_changes.before: Contract only guidance for future windows in the Home domain doc
contract_status_changes.after: Implemented as Home-owned template metadata with deterministic Today, Weekend, This Week, and Custom window rules plus Home UI persistence

contract_status_changes.contract: Protocol lifecycle boundary for scheduled templates
contract_status_changes.before: No schedule metadata existed, so template/run separation was documented but untested against window fields
contract_status_changes.after: Schedule windows remain template labels only and do not auto-start, auto-complete, auto-abandon, or rewrite protocol runs

residual_risks: No running-app smoke, screenshot proof, or device proof was performed for the new Home protocol schedule UI.
Schedule windows currently change Home template labels only; they do not yet drive Today projection, stale treatment, or overdue prioritization beyond the template caption.
recommended_next_reason: Once this slice is committed and mirrored, the clean running-app smoke harness is ready to support a Write flow proof pass without layering new behavior onto a dirty worktree.
